name: Rage
description: Enter a fury. Recovers on Long Rest.

name: Reckless Attack
description: Advantage on melee attacks, enemies get advantage on you. No usage limit.

name: Bardic Inspiration
description: Grant inspiration die to allies. Recovers on Long Rest (Short at Lv5+).

name: Channel Divinity
description: Channel divine power. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Wild Shape
description: Transform into a beast. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Action Surge
description: Take an additional action. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Second Wind
description: Recover HP as bonus action. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Superiority Dice
description: Fuel combat maneuvers. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Ki Points
description: Fuel ki abilities. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Lay on Hands
description: HP pool for healing. Recovers on Long Rest.

name: Divine Sense
description: Detect celestials, fiends, undead. Recovers on Long Rest.

name: Sorcery Points
description: Fuel metamagic. Recovers on Long Rest.

name: Arcane Recovery
description: Recover spell slots once per day on Short Rest.

name: Hexblade's Curse
description: Curse a creature for bonus damage. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.

name: Breath Weapon
description: Exhale destructive energy. Recovers on Short or Long Rest.
